reforms.description: The government aims to enhance cooperation and collaboration in R&D between universities and industry by providing grant support for long-term co-operation arrangements and increasing grants and performance contracts that incentivize collaboration on research projects. Additionally, Türkiye is set to strengthen support for innovation by redesigning R&D support programmes to reinforce collaborative research projects between universities and companies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing collaboration between academia and industry is expected to lead to increased innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has introduced various programmes that provide grant-funding to encourage innovation.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform significantly enhances existing support mechanisms for R&D collaboration but does not constitute a major overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: Support for innovation needs strengthening. R&D support programmes should be redesigned if they prove to be inefficient and additional support be provided where needed.

reforms.description: The government plans to promote labour mobility support schemes between firms and universities to enhance the alignment of skills with market needs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving alignment of skills with market needs is expected to enhance workforce productivity and innovation capacity.
reforms.status_evidence: The plan has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform is significant in promoting labour mobility but does not represent a major systemic change.
reforms.source_quote: Promote labour mobility support schemes between firms and universities.

reforms.description: Türkiye aims to enhance support for technological progress and innovation to improve productivity and living standards, addressing the lag in innovation performance compared to other OECD countries.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Strengthening support for innovation is expected to boost productivity and living standards.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet legislated.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a major overhaul of the innovation support system.
reforms.source_quote: Support for technological progress and innovation needs to be strengthened to foster productivity growth and raise living standards sustainably.

reforms.description: Türkiye has introduced various government programmes that provide grant-funding to the academic sector, companies, and state research labs to encourage innovation, with a focus on high-technology projects.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Providing grant funding to encourage innovation is expected to stimulate economic growth and technological advancement.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has implemented various programmes to provide grant funding.
reforms.importance_rationale: The introduction of various funding programmes is significant but does not represent a major systemic change.
reforms.source_quote: Various government programmes encourage innovation by providing grant-funding to the academic sector, companies and the state's research and development labs.

reforms.description: The Women-Up project supports female employment in small-scale and young enterprises founded by female entrepreneurs, providing financial support to eligible beneficiaries for up to 20 months.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Supporting female entrepreneurs is expected to enhance economic participation and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The project has been successfully implemented to support female entrepreneurs.
reforms.importance_rationale: The project is significant in promoting female entrepreneurship but does not represent a major systemic change.
reforms.source_quote: The Women-Up project supports female employment in small-scale and young enterprises founded by female entrepreneurs.

reforms.description: The UNI-VERI project was initiated to evaluate the labor market prospects of tertiary degree programs, providing a digital platform for comparing various higher education programs based on employment outcomes.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Evaluating labor market prospects enhances the alignment of education with market needs, supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The project has been successfully implemented to evaluate labor market prospects.
reforms.importance_rationale: The project is significant in improving educational outcomes but does not represent a major systemic change.
reforms.source_quote: The UNI-VERI project was started in 2019 by the Human Resources Office of the Presidency.
